name: HP OMEN 16 (2024)
introText: The HP OMEN 16 2024 packs an AMD Ryzen 7 and NVIDIA RTX 4060 into a 16.1-inch 144Hz FHD laptop for $1,499 CAD — the best gaming performance per dollar in a budget gaming laptop.
whatWorks: RTX 4060 handles 1080p gaming at high-ultra settings in all modern titles — delivers 60fps+ in demanding games like Cyberpunk, and 120fps+ in competitive titles like Valorant and Fortnite.
Best gaming performance-per-dollar under $1,500 in Canada — no competitor offers RTX 4060 class performance cheaper.
worthKnowing: FHD 1080p display is adequate but not premium — the 16.1-inch 1080p resolution looks slightly soft compared to 1440p alternatives. Fine for gaming, mediocre for photo editing.
Bulkier than premium gaming laptops at 2.3kg — heavy to carry daily; better as a dorm or desk machine than a travel laptop.

commonComplaints.title: FHD display feels low-res on a 16-inch screen
commonComplaints.body: 1920x1080 at 16 inches is noticeably lower pixel density than QHD alternatives. Text and UI elements look slightly soft.

commonComplaints.title: Fan noise is loud under gaming load
commonComplaints.body: The OMEN 16 runs fans at full speed during gaming, producing significant noise. Headphones are recommended.

commonComplaints.title: Build quality is plastic and average
commonComplaints.body: The chassis uses plastic throughout — functional but not premium. Flex is noticeable in the lid.

verdict: The HP OMEN 16 2024 is the best budget gaming laptop for price-conscious gamers — RTX 4060 performance at $1,499 is hard to beat. If you want 1440p or premium build quality, save up for the ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14. For pure gaming value, the OMEN 16 delivers.

realBuyers.quote: Running games at 1080p high or ultra. RTX 4060 handles everything I play. Great value.
Gets loud during gaming but performance is solid. Best gaming laptop I could afford.
Bought for university gaming. Does everything I need. Battery is bad for gaming but fine for class.

metaDescription: HP OMEN 16 2024 review Canada: Ryzen 7, RTX 4060, 144Hz FHD. ~$1,499 CAD. Best budget gaming laptop value under $1,500 for Canadians.
